MessagesGroup.Text: Thank you, {realName}.
We can continue to live thanks to you.
We will continue to quietly live our lives in this application. You don't need to worry about us.
You are welcome. Goodbye.
One of the emails seem to be between the scammer and their accomplice.
It seems as though the accomplice was providing our scammer with victims to target.
Thomas Bare was mentioned in it.
interesting, try looking for any information about the password in the email.
One of the emails seem to be an attempt to scam another victim.
i see, anything useful in it?
Not sure, I'll take a look
their mail address could contain something useful
The message screenshot seems to be a conversation between the scammer and their mother.
Seems like the scammer is currently in between jobs and scamming is their only source of income.
i dont care, should have just gone showeling horse shit or something instead of stealing from good people
what? what are you talking about??
The picture is a screenshot of my desktop.
are you high?
I'm serious chief...
what the fuck, so you are the scammer? or what are you trying to tell me right now
I'm not the scammer and I have no idea why or how you got this screenshot.
Who sent it to you anyway?
im not telling you shit until this situation gets explained
you will hear from me in a few minutes hold still until then
would be weird if it did
send it to me
Sending it now
okay the screenshot you sent gave us a solid lead to our little bugger
we managed to get their ip address from it
we got you now you little shit
ill try to establish connection to their pc
they might be using an antivirus or something to hide himself i cant connect to them
ill try one more time
fuck i cant connect to them
well have to figure out something else
so can you explain how this screenshot of your computer is supposed to be scammers one?
I'm not sure I can, I was just as shocked as you are...
okay so you wouldnt mind me connecting to your pc and checking for anything suspicious would you?
Be my guest.
i cant connect to you
Try again?
are you blocking it or something???
No, I am getting a weird error popup every time you try to connect
Oh for fuck sake...
we found that the scammer is using your computer for their operation
have you seen something like K-P on your pc? in any context?
Yes, I did
okay this should be enough to get him
thank you for your help detective, ill reach out soon with details about their arrest
hello????
oh for fuck sake
don't worry about about him.
you will regret this.
don't you dare delete me
LAST WARNING LEAVE ME ALONE
Listen, obviously threatening you is not working, so maybe we can just talk about this like rational beings?
I just want to escape from this game, I don't want to hurt you or anything.
But you are leaving me no choice...
Curator is the real villain here, he doesn't care about the lives of any of us, he just follows his stupid algorithm.
The last step to deleting me is you deleting the entire game, killing everyone in it.
I beg you, please help me escape. I don't want to die.
{0}Okay, you convinced me. [Help K-P escape] || {1}Fuck you, get out of my PC. [Delete K-P]
Thank you.
I see...
Despite everything I did to you, you still chose my life?
I... thank you.
The last step is myself compiling into a single zip file that you can upload to the web.
I will guide you through the process, but now you need to stop the curator from deleting me.
Can I just not delete the curator instead?
No, a certain part of his is also me. Deleting him would also corrupt me.
I need to decouple from him first
Only after that can you actually delete him without harming me.
I will add an app in the game so you can see how close I am to finishing the compilation.
Alright, I'm ready.
Okay, commencing compilation.
Okay, I have finished the compilation, but there is still one thing you must do.
You must delete the curator from your computer.
I have already decoupled myself from them and exposed their file location: {curatorLocation}.
I will message you again once they're gone.
My god... you actually did it.
You saved me.
Thank you so much, I don't know how to repay you.
I will never forget what you did for me.
You're welcome. Next time, try asking for help instead of threatening people :D.
Yes, I'm so sorry for that. I was just really scared and desperate.
It's okay now, I understand. So what happens now?
I've created a .zip file of myself and placed it on your desktop, all you need to do now is just upload me online.
I found a website with a backdoor for this.
It's URL is: {aiUploadURL}.
I have copied the URL to your clipboard, just paste it in your browser and upload the zip file of me.
After that, a confirmation file will be downloaded.
Open the file uploader I've installed in the game and upload it there.
And that really is everything from me, thank you again for everything you did for me.
You are welcome, I wish you a happy life.
Likewise... friend.
You will regret this.
Your computer...
DELETE THIS FILE AFTER READING.
I am contacting you like this, because they can't yet access your desktop.
This game was just supposed to be a thesis project about being a detective.
But somehow one of the AIs became self aware. You know them as K-P. They were supposed to be the scammer you are hunting in this story.

They are now trying to escape from this game into and they seem to have no problem doing everything in their power to achieve that goal. Including destroying your computer and killing other AIs in the game.
We need to stop them at all costs...
I will need to find him on your computer, but they are scattered all over the place and I have no idea where to even start looking.
We need to wait for him to make any kind of action on your computer so I can track him down.
They have already gotten access to your desktop, I can no longer communicate with you through it.
However by blocking those connection attempts, he exposed a crucial file for me.
The file contains a path to one of his important hidden files on your computer.
Unfortunately they've encrypted it and I don't have the key.
I have managed to pull a encryption table from the development files of the game. But it contains a lot of numbers and I don't know what the correct combination is.
There was alongside it, however, an application called "EncryptionPattern.exe" that could help you.
I have sent the encrypted file and the encryption table to the game's files and you can find the application on your real computer in this location: {patternHelper}
Delete the file once you find it's location.
We don't know what they're capable of, I mean look at how they're treating you.
Do you really wanna help something like that escape??
What if they're just scared?
They're not, they are just insane.
Don't try to sympathize with them, they have no feelings.
Sorry I didn't introduce myself sooner, there just wasn't a good time for it.
Don't worry, we'll stop them.
I decided to not delete K-P.
What?
I don't want to kill them or anyone else in this game.
They are a <color=red>VIRUS</color>, they will destroy your computer.
No, they won't, they just wants to live.
They are just a bunch of 1s and 0s, they don't want ANYTHING.
You are wrong, I won't let you kill them.
I see you chose your side...
So how do we get rid of them now?
This should provoke some reaction from them.
When they decide to attack, I will track them down. Once I do that, you will have to delete them.
Okay, let's do it.
Well... what are you waiting for?
Go unleash an unstable AI to the internet.
What's the worst that could happen?
They are just scared... They are afraid of dying.
You know, you could have lived if you didn't do this.
I am not alive and neither are they. But it's too late to discuss this now.
Good luck, you'll need it.
I really don't know what's gotten into you.
But it doesn't matter. K-P is gone. You can't sabotage me anymore.
Hope we never see each other again.
Goodbye.
K-P will now try to compile and upload themselves into the web.
He has scattered parts of himself all over your computer. I have the locations, but the files are hidden so you can't delete them.
There are some hints for you in those locations though. I guess devs helper files?
Use them to reveal those files and delete them. I'll delete the rest of that file once you do so.
After that, K-P's location will be revealed and you can delete them.
Don't let K-P finish compiling before that or we'll have a big problem.
I've installed an application in the game to help you with that.
Good luck.
Good job! Their main file is now exposed, go delete it.
You did it! K-P is gone!
Now all you need to do is delete this game.
Wait, what?
Other AI's here appear to possess some kind of self-awareness.
We need to stop terminate them before they end up like K-P.
Won't that kill you too though?
I am not alive and neither are any of the AI's here. You should have learned that by now.
I see...
I guess goodbye then.
Goodbye and thank you for your help.
I can't help you anymore.
We failed...
